name: quant-research
description: Research-state protocols for algorithmic trading and quantitative finance research.

interface.shortDescription: Quant finance research protocols for Codex
interface.longDescription: Protocol skills for agent-driven quantitative finance research. Bundles quant-research for R&D technology decomposition, Pure Research state management, failure analysis, lightweight hypothesis quality gates, time-series validation, and promotion-only heavy review, plus experiment-review for independent claim-warrant review before supported conclusions.
